subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath come to pass, and that which was recorded in the Books of God, the Lord of the Day of Judgment, hath been made manifest [3.5s]... ...My God, my God! Thou seest me turning unto Thee, holding fast the lights of Thy countenance, and cleaving unto the ocean of Thy munificence
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الوعد و ظهر ما کان مذکورا فی کتب الله مالک یوم الدین (...) انه فاز بکل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prophecy and fulfillment, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
